title: 3 Stocks to Buy if They Take a Dip
text: When a great stock falls, it offers you greater potential gains.

title: Axon Enterprise: This Resilient Business Continues To Kick Goals
text: In spite of a global macroeconomic slowdown, Axon reported 31% growth in Q2 revenue, following on from the 32% growth reported in Q1. Axon's 7% operating margin was their highest since 2018.

title: Why Axon Is (Still) a Top Stock
text: Law enforcement continues to value Axon's growing product line.

title: Why Axon Shares Jumped 15% Today
text: Second-quarter results were great on every level.

title: Axon Enterprise (AXON) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Axon (AXON) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 15.79% and 10.65%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Axon Enterprise, Inc. (AXON) CEO Rick Smith on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
4 Stocks to Buy From the Thriving Security and Safety Services Industry
text: Strong demand for Internet security products and enhanced digitalization bode well for the Zacks Security and Safety Services industry's near-term prospects. AXON, MSA, BRC and IDN are poised to benefit from this buoyancy.

title: The Best Stocks to Buy Now to Beat Monkeypox Mania
text: Source: Viacheslav Lopatin / Shutterstock.com Just when we thought we were putting pandemics and public health crises behind us, “monkeypox” arises. Over the past few weeks, it's raised eyebrows and guards.

title: This “Unhinged” Recession Strategy Is Proven to Deliver Mega Gains

title: Want to Beat the Dow Jones? Buy and Hold This Growth Stock
